text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh! All right! If my research keeps going this
well, we're golden!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, okay, stay calm. I need to verify the results
next.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If possible, I'd like to have more test subjects
than just Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Let's see. There must be some adventurous
Umamusume around. Time to start my search.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Just any Umamusume won't be good enough,
though. They need to have a physique suitable
for experimentation...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It won't be easy to choose, but if it's for the sake
of research...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Come to think of it, it's almost time for
training.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But that's fine, surely Trainer would be happier to
see me show up after finding a new test subject!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Just wait and see, Trainer! We'll be getting a new
collaborator very soon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And like that, Agnes Tachyon becomes so
preoccupied with her search for a test subject
that she completely skips out on training.
